title: Battle of Kuat (Second Galactic Civil War)

ships **Light cruisers **Corvettes *Minor [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] ships **[[Chelandion]]s''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' **[[Batil]]s **[[Tarrada]]s *Minor [[Commenor/Legends|Commenorian]] ships *Other minor ships |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=Heavy |casual2=Heavy |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|Whoever wins there wins the war.|[[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]]|''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]''}} The '''Battle of Kuat''' was fought in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]] between members of the [[Fifth Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Galactic Alliance Fifth Fleet]] commanded by [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] and the [[Confederation]]. ==Prelude== Jacen Solo had a [[Force vision/Legends|vision]] that a decisive battle was going to be fought at [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]] and if the Confederation were to win, they would immediately head for [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. ==The battle== The battle had lasted for a week and was fairly evenly matched. Jacen needed the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and the Hapan Home Fleet to arrive and turn the tide of the battle in his favor. The plan was for his uncle, [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], and other Jedi to take a wing of [[StealthX]] craft and make an attack run through the [[Confederation Fleet|Corellian ships]] utilizing [[Jedi shadow bomb]]s, reloading at the ''[[Megador]]'' before attacking the Bothan fleet, and repeating until the Confederation fleet collapsed. ===Jedi withdrawal=== {{Quote|...You'll have to crush the Confederation without StealthXs. The Jedi can support you no longer.''"
"''What? You can't desert ''now''! We can end this war!''"
"''We could destroy the Confederation fleets and kill a lot of rebels But I don't think you ''can'' end this war, Jacen. I don't think you even know what it's about.''|Luke Skywalker and Jacen Solo|}} As the battle was commencing, [[Ben Skywalker]], Luke's son and Jacen's cousin, was meeting with deposed Chief of State [[Cal Omas]] on Coruscant. After discussing the possibility of Jacen's involvement in the recent death of Ben's mother, [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara]], Omas killed himself, making it look as if Ben had assassinated him. Luke, despite his own grief over the death of his wife, was initially prepared to aid Jacen in fighting the Confederation. However, it was then that news of Omas's death reached the Jedi. Luke, infuriated, confronted Jacen in the latter's personal quarters. After a tense conversation concerning Jacen's occupation of the [[Jedi Academy (Ossus)|Jedi Academy]] on [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]] and Ben, Luke announced his withdrawal of support for Jacen. He and the Jedi left the battle, leaving Jacen facing much worse odds. Jacen turned the Hapan Home Fleet back to Hapes, unwilling to risk the reign of his lover, [[Queen Mother]] [[Tenel Ka Djo]]. With the Jedi desertion, the battled turned into a protracted bloodbath with high casualties on both sides. ==Aftermath== {{Quote|The Jedi have betrayed us.|Jacen Solo, to Nek Bwua'tu|}} Outraged at this betrayal, Jacen was struck with a sudden brainstorm. Both the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]] and the Confederation were courting [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] in earnest - whomsoever could convince the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] to add their sizable fleet to their own would certainly defeat the other. He took the ''Anakin Solo'' to Kashyyyk and decided to [[Battle of Kashyyyk (Second Galactic Civil War)|attack]] the planet thus drawing off the Confederate attack on Kuat. ==Appearances== *''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]'' {{1st}} *''[[Legacy of the Force: Fury]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[Fate of the Jedi: Outcast]]'' {{Ab|Fate of the Jedi: Outcast (audiobook)}} {{Imo}} *''[[Fate of the Jedi: Backlash]]'' {{Ab|Fate of the Jedi: Backlash (audiobook)}} {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{SecondGalacticCivilWarNav}} {{Interlang |de=Schlacht von Kuat (40 NSY) |es=Batalla de Kuat (Segunda Guerra Civil Galáctica) }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Kuat (Second Galactic Civil War), Battle of}} [[Category:Battles of Kuat]] [[Category:Battles of the Second Galactic Civil War]]
